title: クラシックに向けた記者会見

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During her interview at the Satsuki Sho press
conference, Tokai Teio declares she will become
a Triple Crown champion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, that dream won't come true so easily. In
order to catch up to and eventually surpass the
great Symboli Rudolf...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio pulls out all the stops and trains like
never before.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Symboli Rudolf watches from the
sidelines, quietly admitting that she has been
waiting for someone like Teio to challenge her.
